chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. No. D-2984 of 2021 Date Order with signature of Judge FRESH CASE. 1. For orders on Misc. No.13617/2022. 2. For orders on Office Objection No.1 & 3. 3. For orders on CMA No.12950/2021. 4. For hearing of main case. 25.09.2025. No one is in attendance on behalf of the Petitioner and no intimation has been received. A perusal of the Order Sheet reflects that this Petition has been pending over a protracted period without having been properly pursued. Under the given circumstances, it appears that the Petitioner has lost interest in the Petition, which stands dismissed accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE MUBASHIR
